input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Jyka has a direct effect on yupt and kwox. Qwiu has a direct effect on yupt and kwox. Yupt has a direct effect on kwox. Qwiu is unobserved. The overall probability of jyka is 0%. The probability of not jyka and kwox is 11%. The probability of jyka and kwox is 0%. Is the chance of kwox smaller when observing jyka?
